title: Prepare the Uniface 9 Application for Migration
breadcrumbs: Prepare the Uniface 9 Application for Migration
text: Prepare the Uniface 9 Application for Migration Prepare your Uniface 9 application for migration to Uniface 10 to avoid migration issues and functional changes to your application. Previous step: Prepare to Migrate from Uniface 9 During migration to Uniface 10, Uniface will reject any part of an import if it detects non-migrated definitions coming from version 8. Compile your application definitions from the command line, using the latest Uniface 9.6 or 9.7 release. Review the compiler messages and correct any identified issues. The latest Uniface 9.7 release reports additional compiler warnings that indicate possible incompatibilities with Uniface 10: Warning: Warning: 1000 Entry EntryName from model overwrites definition from component. In future Uniface versions, this will be reversed Determine whether to migrate Uniface 9 defaults to Uniface 10. For more information, see Migration of Uniface 9 Defaults . If necessary, correct your definitions to remove unnecessary dependencies to unused Include Procs. Run and test the migrated application in Uniface 9. Next step: Migrate Repository Objects from Uniface 9 Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
